category_sources: source_facts.description says Viewer for the DjVu image format; official DjView4 page describes it as a portable DjVu viewer and browser plugin.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading uses DjView4; source_facts.name is djview4.
docs_sources: Official DjVuLibre site provides the DjView4 project page, man page, and documentation index.
repo_sources: Official DjVuLibre site links Browse Git to SourceForge; SourceForge hosts the DjVuLibre Djview-git source browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official DjView4 page lists DjVu viewing, Qt portability, continuous scrolling, side-by-side display, thumbnails, outlines, and metadata dialog.
